description_long: This is a large, modern multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly light gray or white, featuring numerous rectangular and arched windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, hot tub, outdoor seating, a barbecue area, a swing set, and a trampoline, as well as a large potted tree and decorative landscaping elements. The house has a prominent garage attached to one side and a covered patio area adjacent to the pool. The main entryway is marked by a set of double doors and a small overhang, with steps leading up to the entrance. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban residence designed for both comfort and outdoor leisure.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with a flat roof, many windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool, patio, and recreational amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, garage, pool, patio, and outdoor amenities including a large potted tree and trampoline.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, pool, hot tub, outdoor seating, and the back of the house with visible windows and garage extension.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the arched and rectangular windows, garage, and the arrangement of outdoor features including the tree and curved pathways.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the pool area, curved landscaping, trampoline, and the side of the house with minimal window openings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of rectangular and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a small overhang and steps, minimal decorative elements, and a clean, modern look
